info.title: Basalt API
info.description: Pro-tier hosted backend for Basalt. Runs on Cloudflare Workers; Open-tier surfaces (CLI, plugin, MCP, desktop) do not call this API.

VaultSnapshot.description: Client-built snapshot of the user's local index — notes, embeddings (base64-float32), and wikilinks.

today.description: ISO date the engine should treat as today.

get.description: Returns the worker's deployed version, schema, and a UTC timestamp.
Probes D1 + KV, returns overall ok|degraded plus per-check detail.

post.description: Generates a server-side state token + provider authorize_url.
Exchanges the OAuth code, fetches user info, upserts the user, issues a session cookie.
Deletes the session in KV and clears the basalt_session cookie.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's id, email, and tier.

delete.description: Sets deleted_at on the user row; data is purged after a 30-day grace window.

post.description: Creates a vault row and enqueues an indexing job.

delete.description: 30-day grace before hard purge. Findings + briefs are retained until the grace window expires.

post.description: Stores a client-built VaultSnapshot (notes + embeddings + links) in R2 keyed by user_id/vault_id. /v1/briefs/generate uses the latest snapshot.

get.description: Returns size, upload time, and custom metadata for the latest snapshot.

post.summary: Re-embed notes into Vectorize for cross-vault search
post.description: Reads the latest snapshot from R2, re-embeds title+content via Workers AI under the canonical model, and upserts the vectors into VECTORIZE with user/vault metadata.
Embeds the query via Workers AI and queries Vectorize. Filters to user-owned vaults; vault_ids[] narrows further. Returns hits sorted by similarity.
Runs the indexer + verbs against the named vault. Pro-tier only. Rate limit 6/min.

delete.summary: Delete a brief and its findings
delete.description: Hard delete (no soft-delete column on briefs).

get.description: Filterable by verb, vault_id, status. Cursor-paginated by finding id.

post.summary: Snooze a finding until a date
Mark a finding as falsified by the user
post.description: Owner-scoped; updates status to 'falsified' with a user-dismissed verdict_reason.
Owner-scoped; updates status to 'confirmed' with verdict timestamp.

post.summary: Promote a finding to a note (client-side)
post.description: Always returns 400 with guidance — promote-to-note runs on the client. The API never mutates user-owned content.

get.description: Returns has_key per provider (openai, anthropic, google).

put.summary: Store or rotate a BYOK provider key
put.description: AES-GCM encrypted at rest in BYOK_KEYS KV. Server-side master key only.

delete.description: Removes the encrypted envelope from KV; logs an audit event.

post.description: Plan = pro | founder. Founder is capped at 200 lifetime seats.
HMAC-SHA256 verified. Handles checkout.session.completed and subscription events.
